systems.system_notes: Cephalomedullary femoral nailing platform for intertrochanteric, subtrochanteric, and selected femoral shaft fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official Gamma4 materials describe an integrated instrument platform shared across the Gamma4 nail family.

components.component_notes: Official Gamma4 materials describe the trochanteric nail for stable and unstable intertrochanteric fractures.
Official Gamma4 materials describe the intermediate nail within the hip fracture nailing system.
Official Gamma4 materials describe the long nail for proximal femur and associated femoral shaft fractures.
Official Gamma4 materials describe cephalic lag screw options, including the RC lag screw expansion.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public Gamma4 materials describe nail families and screw options but do not provide the complete implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure or IFU pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
